About

Arigo Freeline Tattoo is an online-based tattoo brand offering premium home service tattoo sessions. We bring the studio experience to the comfort of your space , creating clean, precise, and personalized ink in a relaxed setting.

Every piece is crafted with intention, blending fine lines, bold strokes, and artistic expression tailored to each client's vision.
